covered_report_window: Tuesday, June 23, 2026 after the U.S. market close, plus Wednesday, June 24, 2026 before the U.S. market open.
market_context_summary: U.S. market context was risk-off in growth/technology, with the Nasdaq and chip complex under pressure, the S&P 500 lower, the Dow firmer, VIX higher, and investors watching oil, gold, Bitcoin, U.S.-Iran headlines, and Thursday PCE inflation. The window is light but includes several event-sensitive names.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Daktronics has the cleanest allocation-quality setup because Q3 showed a 25% backlog increase and profitability improvement, while the market will likely focus on whether backlog converts into revenue and margin in fiscal Q4/FY2027.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Company confirms a pre-market June 24 release; public sources show expected Q4 EPS around $0.23 and revenue around the low-$200M range, with the key issue being backlog-to-revenue conversion and operating margin durability.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Backlog conversion, firm orders, positive FY2027 demand tone, and margin discipline.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Backlog timing slips, project mix pressure, tariff/component cost pressure, or weak FY2027 guide.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: MarketChameleon showed historical DAKT earnings implied moves around 5.3%; StockTitan noted the June 11 scheduling announcement coincided with a sharp positive market reaction, indicating event sensitivity.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Zacks/Yahoo preview indicated expected EPS growth to $0.23; analyst coverage is thinner than large caps, so confidence stays medium rather than high.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: Pass A +36/RR34; Pass B +31/RR39; Pass C +34/RR38. All three leaned up with low disparity.

ranked_companies.timing: Tuesday, June 23, 2026 after market close; 5:00 PM ET call
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: FedEx leans up because Q3 operating momentum, Network 2.0 savings, and post-Freight simplification support the setup, but the stock's strong 2026 rally and need for clean FY2027 guidance keep reversal risk elevated.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Company IR confirms the Q4 FY26 call; public previews show consensus around $5.90-$5.96 EPS and roughly $24.0B revenue, with focus on post-Freight margin, cost savings, CFO search, and FY2027 guidance.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Clean EPS/revenue, stronger post-Freight margin bridge, credible $4B cost-savings path, and upbeat FY2027 commentary.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: FY2027 guidance disappoints, transformation costs rise, parcel demand softens, Amazon/LTL competition narrative worsens, or investors sell the rally.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Investopedia cited an options-implied move near 7%; the stock was up more than 40% year-to-date into the event, raising sell-the-news risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Analyst sentiment is broadly supportive; Investopedia cited 9 of 10 tracked analysts at Buy and average target near $410, while Bank of America cut its target after the Freight separation.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: Pass A +36/RR44; Pass B +28/RR49; Pass C +31/RR46. All three leaned up but flagged priced-in and guidance risk.

ranked_companies.timing: Tuesday, June 23, 2026 after market close; 5:00 PM ET call
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: KB Home leans down because the market is likely to focus on net orders, gross margin, and full-year guide quality in a high-rate affordability environment, even though low expectations create relief-rally risk.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Company confirms a June 23 after-close release; public previews show EPS near $0.45 and revenue near $1.09B, down sharply year over year, with consensus already reset lower.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Orders stabilize, cancellations are controlled, margins hold, and management signals the guide reset was enough.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Net orders or gross margin disappoint, incentives rise, affordability pressure persists, or FY guidance is cut again.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Investing.com cited a 3.3% options-implied move; prior KBH earnings reactions have sometimes exceeded implied moves, including recent downside reactions.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: AlphaStreet noted Q2 EPS consensus slipped from $0.46 to $0.45 over the prior month; broader housing commentary remains cautious amid mortgage-rate pressure.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: Pass A -38/RR43; Pass B -31/RR48; Pass C -42/RR45. All three leaned down but all flagged relief risk.

ranked_companies.timing: Tuesday, June 23, 2026 after market close; 5:00 PM ET call
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Cerebras leans down because the first post-IPO report arrives amid AI-stock volatility, high valuation, customer concentration, and conflicting published expectations, but any strong core-revenue/backlog commentary could squeeze the stock sharply higher.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Company confirms a June 23 after-close release; public sources disagree on revenue framing, with some citing GAAP/consensus near $56.65M and others citing company or core revenue around $181M-$183M because of OpenAI warrant accounting.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Core revenue, backlog conversion, OpenAI/AWS commentary, gross margin, and Q2/FY outlook validate the IPO narrative.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Reported revenue quality is confusing, losses widen, concentration/backlog conversion concerns dominate, or IPO lockup/valuation worries intensify.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Investopedia cited an options-implied move up to 13%; the stock remained above IPO price but far below first-day highs, making reversal risk very high.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Barron's and Investopedia described optimistic analyst coverage and price targets, but also highlighted IPO volatility, OpenAI warrant accounting, and concentration risk.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: Pass A -25/RR78; Pass B -42/RR82; Pass C -18/RR72. All three saw high reversal risk; direction disparity was material.

ranked_companies.timing: Wednesday, June 24, 2026 before market open; 9:30 AM ET call
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Paychex has a modestly positive low-bar setup after a large drawdown, but negative earnings-beat indicators and Paycor integration/margin complexity keep the consensus below a real directional edge.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Company confirms a pre-market June 24 release; Zacks shows EPS consensus at $1.31 and negative Earnings ESP of -1.65%, while Q3 showed strong reported growth boosted by Paycor.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Organic Management Solutions growth improves, Paycor synergy/margin commentary is constructive, and FY2027 tone offsets macro hiring concerns.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Organic growth disappoints, Paycor costs/debt weigh on margins, interest on client funds softens, or guidance is cautious.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Investing.com cited a 6% options-implied move; Options AI displayed a higher expected move, while historical one-day realized moves were lower, implying event pricing may be demanding.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Zacks' negative ESP argues against assuming a beat; the stock is well below its 52-week high, creating some low-bar relief potential.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: Pass A +22/RR36; Pass B +14/RR42; Pass C +25/RR38. Mild positive skew, but one pass stayed Neutral.

ranked_companies.timing: Wednesday, June 24, 2026 before market open; 11:00 AM ET call
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: NOVAGOLD's earnings print is unlikely to be the main driver because the stock trades more on Donlin Gold feasibility, partner, financing, permitting, and gold-price narratives than on quarterly EPS.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Company confirms a pre-market Q2 release; Q1 showed a development-stage loss with no production revenue and spending tied to Donlin BFS workstreams.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Positive Donlin BFS, partner, permitting, or gold-market commentary.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Higher spending, financing dilution concerns, project delays, or gold-price weakness.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: MarketChameleon showed high historical implied/actual earnings moves for NG, but these likely reflect project and gold sentiment more than earnings quality.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Zacks showed expected loss near $0.07; estimate relevance is limited for a development-stage miner.
ranked_companies.pass_agreement: Pass A +7/RR55; Pass B -4/RR59; Pass C +13/RR52. Passes agreed on Neutral but not on slight skew.

research_allocation_view.plain_statement: This is a research prioritization model, not financial advice. The hypothetical same-day research basket assigns 45% to DAKT and leaves 55% unallocated rather than forcing weaker or higher-reversal-risk ideas.

disclaimer_text: This is research, not financial advice. Earnings reactions are highly uncertain and can be driven by market positioning, guidance, macro conditions, and management commentary rather than reported results alone.
